pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the stringlet crate, explaining what it is, why it exists, and when to use it. Cover the core value proposition: fast, cheap, Copy-able inline strings.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Quick start guide showing basic usage patterns, installation, and simple examples of creating and using stringlets.

pages.title: Core Concepts
pages.purpose: Explain fundamental concepts: inline storage, Copy semantics, branchless design, no-std compatibility, and how stringlet differs from String/&str.

pages.title: String Type Variants
pages.purpose: Overview of the four stringlet variants, their trade-offs, and when to choose each one.

pages.title: Stringlet (Fixed-Size)
pages.purpose: Deep dive into Stringlet<SIZE>: fixed-length strings, compiled bounds, fastest variant, use cases and examples.

pages.title: VarStringlet (Variable-Length)
pages.purpose: Explain VarStringlet<SIZE>: variable-length with explicit length byte, 0..=255 constraint, performance characteristics.

pages.title: TrimStringlet (Optional Trim)
pages.purpose: Cover TrimStringlet<SIZE>: UTF-8 niche for optional 1-byte trim, branchless length calculation, ideal for minimal variation.

pages.title: SlimStringlet (6-bit Length)
pages.purpose: Detail SlimStringlet<SIZE>: 6-bit length encoding in UTF-8 niche, 0..=64 constraint, space-efficient for short strings.

pages.title: Construction and Initialization
pages.purpose: Comprehensive guide to creating stringlet instances through various methods: macros, constructors, and conversions.

pages.title: The stringlet! Macro
pages.purpose: Complete reference for the stringlet! macro: syntax variations, size inference, type selection, array construction.

pages.title: Direct Constructors
pages.purpose: Document new(), from_str(), from_utf8(), from_utf8_bytes() and their *_unchecked variants, including safety requirements.

pages.title: Compile-Time Construction
pages.purpose: Explain const construction, compile-time validation, const assertions, and creating const stringlet arrays.

pages.title: Runtime Construction and Conversions
pages.purpose: Cover From/Into traits, FromStr parsing, runtime validation, error handling, and conversion from String/&str.

pages.title: Core Operations
pages.purpose: Reference for fundamental stringlet operations: querying properties, accessing content, and type introspection.

pages.title: Length and Emptiness
pages.purpose: Detailed explanation of len() and is_empty() methods, including how each variant implements length calculation.

pages.title: Content Access
pages.purpose: Document as_bytes(), as_str() methods, safety guarantees, and performance characteristics of content access.

pages.title: Type Introspection
pages.purpose: Cover is_fixed(), is_trim(), is_var(), is_slim() methods and type_name() for runtime type identification.

pages.title: Standard Library Integration
pages.purpose: Overview of how stringlets integrate with Rust's standard library through trait implementations.

pages.title: References and Dereferencing
pages.purpose: Explain Deref to &str, AsRef implementations, and casting between str/String and stringlet types.

pages.title: Display and Debug Formatting
pages.purpose: Document Display and Debug implementations, including alternate debug mode and STRINGLET_RAW_DEBUG environment variable.

pages.title: Comparison and Ordering
pages.purpose: Detail Eq, PartialEq, Ord, PartialOrd implementations, including optimizations for different size and type combinations.

pages.title: Collections and Hashing
pages.purpose: Explain Hash implementation and usage in HashMap/BTreeMap, including performance characteristics.

pages.title: Internal Architecture
pages.purpose: Deep dive into the implementation: StringletBase, Kind system, and core design patterns.

pages.title: StringletBase and Kind System
pages.purpose: Explain the generic StringletBase<Kind, SIZE, LEN> structure, Kind marker types, and PhantomData usage.

pages.title: Length Encoding Strategies
pages.purpose: Detailed explanation of how each variant encodes length: implicit SIZE, explicit byte, UTF-8 niche tagging.

pages.title: UTF-8 Niche Optimization
pages.purpose: Deep dive into TAG constant, niche encoding technique, why 0b11xxxxxx is invalid UTF-8, and branchless calculations.

pages.title: Compile-Time Validation System
pages.purpose: Explain ConfigBase, VarConfig, SlimConfig traits, and how size constraints are enforced at compile time.

pages.title: Macro System
pages.purpose: Document config! and impl_for! macros, code generation patterns, and how they reduce boilerplate.

pages.title: Performance and Design Philosophy
pages.purpose: Explain the design principles behind stringlet: branchless operations, Copy semantics, and performance characteristics.

pages.title: Branchless Design
pages.purpose: Explain the branchless philosophy, how const flags enable compile-time branch elimination, and why this matters for performance.
